codeReview.summary: The feature implementation correctly adds resetForm() function to all 6 form pages (COA, Aspek Kerja, Blok, Kas, Bank, Gudang) and updates Batal button handlers to call resetForm() before onCancel(). Each resetForm() clears all form state variables to their default values. The fix is consistent across all pages and addresses the requirement.

summary: Feature fix-batal-button-all-forms passes review. The commit 91f9551 correctly implements resetForm() in all 6 form pages (COAFormPage, AspekKerjaFormPage, BlokFormPage, KasFormPage, BankFormPage, GudangFormPage). Each resetForm() clears all form state variables and error/success states. Both Batal buttons in each form (header back button and footer Batal button) now call resetForm() before onCancel() to ensure stale data doesn't persist when reopening the form. Typecheck and lint passed. No issues found.
